rebuild_manifest.source_file: D:\汇度编辑部1\项目文章\2026项目表\卫材\仑卡奈单抗\2026 ADPD\ADPD2026_Sysmex_ptau205_poster_final.pdf
rebuild_manifest.product_name_zh: 仑卡奈单抗 p-tau205 检测
rebuild_manifest.rebuild_scope: ADPD 2026 Sysmex p-tau205 海报最小证据包

v2_sources.title: Development of a Fully Automated Plasma p-tau205 Immunoassay Demonstrating High Concordance with an Immunoprecipitation Mass Spectrometry Assay
v2_sources.citation: Ishiki K, Morimitsu Y, Tanaka A, et al. ADPD 2026 poster.

v2_facts.definition: Plasma p-tau205 measured by HISCL showed strong correlation with IP-MS in commercially available samples.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 商业化血浆样本中，HISCL 与 IP-MS 测得的 p-tau205 呈强相关。
v2_facts.value: Strong correlation in N=28 plasma samples including CN, MCI and ADD

v2_facts.definition: Dynamic range of improved HISCL p-tau205 assay.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 改进后 HISCL p-tau205 检测的动态范围。

v2_facts.definition: Repeatability, dilution linearity and spike recovery of the improved assay.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 改进后检测的重复性、稀释线性和加标回收率。

v2_facts.definition: The assay originally developed for CSF was refined to enable reliable measurement of both CSF and plasma p-tau205.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 原本用于 CSF 的 p-tau205 免疫检测经改进后，可稳定测量血浆和 CSF。
v2_facts.value: Single assay for both plasma and CSF

v2_facts.definition: Plasma and CSF p-tau205 levels showed clear separation between clinically diagnosed CN and ADD.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 血浆和 CSF 中，临床诊断为 CN 与 ADD 的 p-tau205 水平均有清晰分离。
v2_facts.value: ADD > CN in both plasma and CSF

v2_facts.definition: One outlier was not supported as nonspecific HISCL reactivity; p-tau181 and t-tau were elevated while NfL remained within typical range.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 1 例离群样本未见非特异性反应证据；其 p-tau181 和 t-tau 升高，而 NfL 仍在典型范围内。
v2_facts.value: 1/28 outlier favored biologically elevated tau profile rather than assay interference
